title: Why could Rei control Eva 00
wikitext:
[]: Why could Rei control Eva-00?             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Fri Jul 14, 2006 1:34 am If I'm correct, the soul inside Eva-00 should be Ritsuko's mother. She killed the first Rei and I think she wouldn't like Rei very much. But why could Rei sit in Eva-00 so many times without being rejected? I remember in one episode talking about Shinji in Eva-00 doing some tests, and Eva-00 went mad and wanted to hit Rei behind the glass. So apparently Eva-00 didn't see eye to eye with Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Fri Jul 14, 2006 1:45 am If it was Ritsuko's mother then how'd it work atall? unless! Rei is like a lesser Kawaru? MAYBE! she just doesn't know how to sync very well at that point lol a bit of a newb for say... In EoE all the eva series were Kawaru clones and Kawaru can raise his sync with any eva at his own will, and Kawaru is the same as Rei just a differnt angel!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jul 14, 2006 2:05 am Most recent thread: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=1179 Short answer: EVA-00 is ensouled by Rei 1

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Fri Jul 14, 2006 2:11 am Yeah that's my thought, but there is always more possibilities we can expand on, of course overthinking comes into play... but then again that's what this site is for!

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Fri Jul 14, 2006 2:11 am Yeah, that's what I think except I don't know how: A. Rei is capable of aggressive action. B. Why would Rei I attack Rei II? Unless, of course, Rei I had a more indpendant soul\personality, and only after Naoko killed her Gendo decided to make her soul docile. Or, alternativly, it's Lilith's Soul that's so docile. One must wonder where Rei I's soul came from, though.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Fri Jul 14, 2006 2:16 am Rei I would of known the truth about the whole cloning thingy if she saw Rei II and thus she attacked gendo cus she was PISS-ED OAFF!

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Fri Jul 14, 2006 2:19 am TheBlueTree wrote: Rei I would of known the truth about the whole cloning thingy if she saw Rei II and thus she attacked gendo cus she was PISS-ED OAFF!

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Fri Jul 14, 2006 2:21 am That's why I don't think saying Rei I's soul was in Eva-00 is correct.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Fri Jul 14, 2006 2:23 am wo-wo-wo-wo-wow! where is Rei II? shes inside the eva right?

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Fri Jul 14, 2006 2:58 am TheBlueTree wrote: wo-wo-wo-wo-wow! where is Rei II? shes inside the eva right?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 14, 2006 3:01 am Read the thread that Mr. Tines linked to, eh? Really, the Naoko theory is deep down in the "Common Misconceptions" bin, and it's one that's never coming out. I wish I had the link to Shin-seiki's "EVA-00 Soul Walkthrough" post at that other forum. Bah. I managed to find this old thing at ANF, which covers some of the usual points. Really could use more economical and up-to-date coverage, though. Someone else can do it. ::p

[]:             Quote Post by Light of the Dawn » Fri Jul 14, 2006 3:06 am Mr. Tines wrote: Most recent thread: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=1179 Short answer: EVA-00 is ensouled by Rei 1

[]:             Quote Post by defiate » Fri Jul 14, 2006 9:25 am Legend wrote: B. Why would Rei I attack Rei II?

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Fri Jul 14, 2006 9:59 am defiate wrote: if Rei I's soul is in Eva 00, then it means either one of two things: scenario 1) Lilith's soul could be split scenario 2) Rei I has a different soul from the other Reis

[]:             Quote Post by defiate » Fri Jul 14, 2006 10:49 am thewayneiac wrote: defiate wrote: if Rei I's soul is in Eva 00, then it means either one of two things: scenario 1) Lilith's soul could be split scenario 2) Rei I has a different soul from the other Reis

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 14, 2006 11:11 am defiate wrote: If you were refering to when Eva00 went bezerk during experiments in nerv, then the truth is that Rei I (Eva00) wasn't trying to attack Rei II. She was trying to attack Ritsuko and it just so happened that Rei II and the glass was right between them.

[]:             Quote Post by defiate » Fri Jul 14, 2006 11:51 am Reichu wrote: and if Rei I had a soul other than Lilith's then does that mean Kaworu once had an original soul or does he hold two?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 14, 2006 12:13 pm defiate wrote: ah right Kaworu was created as a vessel for Adam's soul.

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Fri Jul 14, 2006 2:16 pm Gendo could have placed Lilith's soul in the body of a little girl because that makes her very influenceable and easy to control. It would allow for his vision of 3I to go more fluently.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Fri Jul 14, 2006 9:11 pm I think that Rei can sync with pretty much any unit since she's Lilith in human form, much like how Kaworu was Tabris in human form. Basically, SEELE was going to use Kaworu to start third impact with their scenario, and Gendo was going to use Rei to start it with his. Rei seems to be much more reluctant about her capabilities than Kaworu though, which would explain why she does not reach as impressive synch rates as he could.
